chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 798 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on CMA No.3615/2022. 3. For hearing of main case. 23.01.2025 Mr. Amir Saleem, advocate for the petitioners. The matter pertains to Group Insurance which has already been decided by Division Bench of this court vide judgment dated 13.10.2021 passed in CP No.755 of 2020 (Sukkur). In mutatis mutandis application thereof, this petition is hereby dismissed in limine alongwith pending applications. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
